meaning: n.形而上学者,精神疗法家
examples: The western metaphysician put forwards six ways to solve the problem.
He was the master metaphysician who knew by direct perception that all phenomena are devoid of substance.
He was not religious, and was no metaphysician; but he wanted and expected men to evolve until they became like gods.
When a metaphysician makes a choice how to extend a theory, you have to make a decision.
